Pr.tagline: Reputation doesn't create itself - we create it!
Pr.description: People are talking about you. And we control how they talk:
list: We build image and news hooks based on brand strategy
You're written about in media, business platforms and bloggers talk about you
We boost first persons: interviews, forums, columns
We launch PR campaigns and viral special projects
We work with negativity — fast, clear, without panic

WeHere.crisis_description: Scandalous headlines, hate in social networks, leaks in Telegram, panic in the team...
WeHere.crisis_question: Do you think everything is lost?

Brand.title: Brand strategy
Brand.subtitle: for your brand:
list: We monitor mentions in media, social networks, blogs and reviews
We analyze tone and dynamics - we understand the scale
We identify sources of negativity and threats to reputation
We form the official position of the company
We launch crisis communications through media and social networks
We publish positive materials - cases, interviews, columns
We work with reviews, reduce the impact of negativity;
We push bad mentions out of search results (SERM).
